q: The failure of the electrolytic capacitors can cause an explosion or a fire.
The capacitance of a parallel-plate capacitor is inversely proportional to the area of the plates.
A resistor is a circuit component that stores electrical energy.
Capacitors in series all have the same charge.
The capacitor was originally known as a condenser.
The potential difference across each capacitor in parallel is the same.
Film capacitors use plastic film as the conductors.
The SI unit of capacitance is the farad (F).
A capacitor stores electrical energy in the form of a magnetic field.
The thicker the ceramic disc, the greater the capacitance of the ceramic capacitor.
Electrolytic capacitors have a wide tolerance capacity.
A dielectric is an insulating material.
The energy stored in a capacitor is U = 1/2 CV².
Ceramic capacitors use ceramic as the conductors.
In ceramic capacitors, one can develop both high capacitance and low capacitance.
The capacitance of a variable capacitor can be mechanically adjusted.
The equivalent capacitance of capacitors in parallel is always less than any individual capacitance.
A capacitor consists of two conductors separated by an insulator.
The failure of the electrolytic capacitors can be hazardous.
Electrolytic capacitors use the oxide layer as the dielectric.
The capacitance of a parallel-plate capacitor depends on the material between the plates.
Capacitors in parallel all have the same potential difference.
The unit of electric field strength is V m⁻¹.
The capacitance values of ceramic capacitors are stable with respect to the applied voltage.
The total charge of capacitors in series is the sum of individual charges.
Air is often used as a dielectric in variable capacitors.
The capacitor is similar to a fixed battery.
The equivalent capacitance of series capacitors is 1/Cs = 1/C1 + 1/C2 + ...
A dielectric constant is a dimensionless quantity.
The electric field inside a conductor in electrostatic equilibrium is zero.
Capacitors are used to block direct current while allowing alternating current to pass.
When a dielectric is inserted, the capacitance decreases.
The charge on a capacitor is directly proportional to the potential difference.
Paper capacitors use thin sheets of metal foil as electrodes.
The capacitance of a parallel-plate capacitor is directly proportional to the distance between the plates.
One farad is equal to one coulomb per volt.
Mica capacitors are used in high-frequency circuits.
A lightning conductor is an application of the discharge of electricity from points.
The potential at a point due to a charge depends on the distance from the charge.
Work must be done to charge a capacitor.
The electric potential is a vector quantity.
Film capacitors are available in nearly any value.
Surface charge density is charge per unit volume.
The capacitance is always a positive quantity.
An electric dipole consists of two equal and opposite charges.
Electric field lines never cross each other.
The equivalent capacitance of parallel capacitors is Cp = C1 + C2 + ...
Coulomb's law applies to stationary point charges.
The force between two charges is independent of the medium.
The potential on the surface of a charged conductor is the same at all points.
